findings.evidence: `Comodule` and `Hom` are defined with only `AddCommMonoid` assumptions at `TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule.lean:45-46` and `:104-106`; the PR itself proves `ComoduleCat.preadditive` at that level by inserting `letI : AddCommGroup _ := Module.addCommMonoidToAddCommGroup R` at `Preadditive.lean:174-183`, while the preceding Hom instances demand explicit groups at `Preadditive.lean:48-50` and `:133`.
findings.fix: State these declarations under `[AddCommMonoid C] [Module R C] [Coalgebra R C]` and `[AddCommMonoid M/N/P] [Module R _] [Comodule R C _]`, deriving local additive groups with `Module.addCommMonoidToAddCommGroup R` or deriving `AddCommGroup (Comodule.Hom R C M N)` from the existing `Module R (Comodule.Hom R C M N)`.
findings.issue: `instNeg`, `instSub`, `instZSMul`, `instAddCommGroupRing`, and the neg/sub composition lemmas require explicit `[AddCommGroup C] [AddCommGroup M] [AddCommGroup N]`, so the unbundled `Comodule.Hom` API is unavailable for ordinary ring-comodule hypotheses stated with only `AddCommMonoid` plus `Module`.

summary: The new preadditive structure is at the right categorical level, but the unbundled `Comodule.Hom` additive-group API is stated with unnecessarily strong group assumptions instead of the existing semimodule assumptions over a ring.
